texto: See, I have set before you this day life and good, death and evil... I have set before you life and death, blessing and curse; therefore choose life.
explicacao: Citação de Moses sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “See, I have set before you this day life and good, death and evil... I have set before you life a…” articula vida, good, evil em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como luto e good.

frase_original: See, I have set before you this day life and good, death and evil... I have set before you life and death, blessing and curse; therefore choose life.

texto: You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your might. And these words that I command you today shall be on your heart. You shall teach them diligently to your children, and shall talk of them when you sit in your house, and when you walk by the way, and when you lie down, and when you rise.
explicacao: Citação de Moses sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mig…” articula amor, love, children em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como children e today.

frase_original: You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your might. And these words that I command you today shall be on your heart. You shall teach them diligently to your children, and shall talk of them when you sit in your house, and when you walk by the way, and when you lie down, and when you rise.
